text.title: License Compliance Scan Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of gov-license-compliance-scan. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: CI uses `scancode:latest`; verdicts change when scanner updates; diffs unreviewable.
Direct deps Apache/MIT only; transitive includes AGPL via 3-hop chain; legal misses it.
antipattern.root-cause: Scanner mode set to direct only.
antipattern.fix: Use transitive resolution (Syft default + ScanCode `--package` deep mode).

antipattern.symptom: Engineer adds GPL dep with chat-approval 'we got an exception'; no record.
antipattern.fix: Exceptions require `legal-approved` label + linked record + expiry date.
